payload.title: [MEDIUM] Missing web-hardening headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, nosniff, HSTS, Referrer-Policy)
payload.description: No security headers set anywhere (verified). Authenticated app served same-origin as marketing site; no frame-ancestors/X-Frame-Options => clickjacking; no CSP/nosniff weakens XSS containment. FIX: add helmet-equivalent headers on the cloud path (CSP tuned for the SPA + mermaid).
